subcodes.title: Prologue to the Lawh-i-Mubahilih
subcodes.first_line: We heard that some of our opponents desired to come into the presence of this youth. Say: Come, and do not delay! We have appointed as the meeting-place the house of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلوم احباءالله بوده باشد که یومى از ایام سید دجال بمکر جدیدى قیام نموده
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
